description: Closed-form achieved-power calculation: solve for power (1 - beta) given a fixed sample size and effect size.
rules: read-only: computes a number, mutates no external state
TEST selects the solver: t_ind, t_paired, t_one, anova, two_proportions, one_proportion, correlation, chi2, linear_regression
pass NOBS1 for per-group tests (t_ind, two_proportions); pass NOBS for total-n tests (anova, chi2, regression, correlation, one-sample)
this is a priori power at a planned n - NOT post-hoc / observed power (which is circular and should not be reported)
usage: Set TEST, the effect inputs, and a sample size (NOBS1 or NOBS). Optional ALPHA (default 0.05), ALTERNATIVE, RATIO. Output: achieved_power.json.
limitation: Closed-form only. Do not feed the effect size you just estimated from the same data - that is observed power and is uninformative.
